/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/mavivatan_interfaces/libmavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/mavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/mavivatan_interfaces/msg/_ida_durum_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/baris/mavivatan_ws/build/mavivatan_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libmavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libmavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
